title: calamagrostis filiformis
intro: Calamagrostis filiformis, also known as Slender Hair-grass or Slender Brome, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Calamagrostis filiformis include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and even exhibiting antioxidant properties. This plant is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
